name: topview-ai
description: Use TopView AI from Codex to research competitors, write video scripts and prompts, generate media and Storyboard previews, and publish videos to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

interface.shortDescription: Research competitors, script videos, generate media, and publish.
interface.longDescription: TopView AI lets Codex handle the full marketing content loop: collect structured public web and social sources, creator lists, comments, trend signals, competitor content, and prompts; turn briefs or research into video creative strategy, scripts, hooks, storyboards, and model-ready prompts; generate videos, images, Storyboard grid preview images, talking avatars, product model shots, background removal, and voice outputs; then upload finished videos to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube through the local social-upload workflow.
defaultPrompt: Write a short-form product video script.
Collect competitor content ideas from YouTube and Reddit.
Generate a Storyboard preview for this drama beat.
